title: Ashley 1x Lavender Hanging Wardrobe Dehumidifier - Home Bedroom Cupboard Anti-Mould Damp Moisture Condensation Absorber Trap Bags
features: This dehumidifier bag is specially designed to hang in your wardrobe to remove moisture.
It will securely collect & absorb twice its weight in water to help stop damp, mould, mildew & condensation.
It is ideal for use inside wardrobes & cupboards etc.
2 Year Warranty - With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
description: This dehumidifier bag is specially designed to hang in your wardrobe to remove moisture. It will securely collect & absorb twice its weight in water to help stop damp, mould, mildew & condensation. It is ideal for use inside wardrobes & cupboards etc. It should last between 3-6 weeks, depending on the humidity in the atmosphere.
